# SliceURL

> SliceURL is a fast, secure link shortener with branded QR codes, real-time click analytics, password-protected links, and bulk shortening — built for creators, marketers, and developers.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Shorten URLs and explore SliceURL features.
- [About](/about): What SliceURL is and who builds it.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Free, Pro, and Business plans.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach the SliceURL team.
- [Developers](/developers): REST API documentation and API keys.
- [UTM Builder](/utm-builder): Build trackable campaign URLs.
- [SliceBox](/slicebox): Share files up to 200 MB with a short link.
- [LittleSlice](/littleslice): Temporary file sharing up to 2 GB with expiry.
- [CreepyURL](/creepyurl): Disguised short links for fun.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](/terms)
- [Refund Policy](/refund-policy)
